6a300025d2999bc7b9bba906 description: You want Volkov to open his door? Then you do not come empty-handed. Tony likes proof, and I like insurance. Bring me something valuable first. A watch, gold, coin, antique, trophy, anything that proves you know what is worth carrying. After that, go to Ground Zero dressed like one of my people. Scav vest, Ushanka, cheap weapon, dirty work. Kill PMCs while they are still trying to figure out who you are. Then leave alive. If you can do that, Tony may decide you are worth hearing.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba906 note: Fence wants you to pay for the introduction with a valuable or collectible item, then prove you can pass for Scav trash while killing PMCs on Ground Zero.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba906 startedMessageT: Start with something valuable. Then put on the scav kit and go to Ground Zero. Kill PMCs. Walk out alive.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba906 successMessageT: Good. You paid the price, wore the rags, and still made PMCs bleed. Tony heard enough. The door is open, for now.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba906 failMessageText: You made noise, but not the kind that opens doors.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba906 completePlayerM: The payment is handed over. Ground Zero is handled.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba906 changeQuestMess: Fence is watching how you handle the introduction.
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba907: Hand over 1 valuable or collectible item
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba908: Eliminate 8 PMCs on Ground Zero while wearing a Scav vest and Ushanka
6a300025d2999bc7b9bba909: Survive and extract from Ground Zero
